description_long: This factory building features a red brick exterior with large industrial-style windows, giving it a classic industrial appearance. The structure includes multiple sections, with a prominent main building, attached garage, and several black-roofed annexes. Three tall smokestacks rise from the central portion, emphasizing its industrial function. The property is surrounded by a fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs, including a flowering tree near the entrance. The rooftop is mostly flat, with some areas open to the sky, and there are visible interior spaces such as offices and work areas. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century industrial architecture, blending utilitarian function with robust construction.
description: A red brick factory building with large industrial windows, three smokestacks, and black-roofed annexes, surrounded by fencing and landscaping. The structure features multiple sections and a flat rooftop, evoking a classic industrial style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, garage, landscaped yard, and three smokestacks rising from the central section.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the black-roofed annexes, the fenced perimeter, and the flowering tree near the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the long expanse of brick wall, multiple large windows, and the full height of the smokestacks.
description_view_3: This angled view reveals the back and side of the building, with visible interior spaces and additional landscaping.
